title: Endometrium Dissociation with Trypsin
author: Regina Hoo
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.72dhqa6

steps.title: Following step 10 from "Endometrium dissociation...
steps.instruction: Following step 10 from "Endometrium dissociation with collagenase" protocol, where pieces of tissue are retained on the cell strainer. Collect pieces retained on the filter by inverting the filter into a new 50 mL tub and adding 45 ml of PBS with a 1 mL pipette.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 450 g for 00:05:00 together with collagenased sample
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 450 g for 00:05:00 together with collagenased sample. Discard supernatants.

steps.title: Resuspend the pieces with 10 mL Trypsin/EDTA 0
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pieces with 10 mL Trypsin/EDTA 0.25% and incubate for 00:20:00 at 37 °C while shaking.

steps.title: Add 20 mL of RPMI with 10% FBS
steps.instruction: Add 20 mL of RPMI with 10% FBS.

steps.title: Filter material slowly and carefully (very...
steps.instruction: Filter material slowly and carefully (very dens liquid) through a 100 μM strainer. Discard retained tissue.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 500 rcf for 00:05:00 at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 500 rcf for 00:05:00 at 4 °C . Discard supernatant. Same step as 14 in "Endometrium dissociation with collagenase" protocol

steps.title: {optional} Resuspend sample with 5 mL...
steps.instruction: {optional} Resuspend sample with 5 mL of RLB mix and incubate for 00:10:00 *RLB preparation: Dilute 10x RLB stock with water After RBC lysis, add 10 mL of PBS and centrifuge at 500 rcf for 00:05:00

steps.title: Resuspend cells in 1 mL of PBS in an Eppendorf
steps.instruction: Resuspend cells in 1 mL of PBS in an Eppendorf.

steps.title: Count live cells using tryphan blue and haematocytometer
steps.instruction: Count live cells using tryphan blue and haematocytometer.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 500 rcf for 00:05:00 at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 500 rcf for 00:05:00 at 4 °C . Discard supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend with 250 µL of PBS...
steps.instruction: Resuspend with 250 µL of PBS (final volume depending on cell number)

steps.title: Filter cells trough a cell strainer snap cap tube
steps.instruction: Filter cells trough a cell strainer snap cap tube.

steps.title: {Optional} Resuspend cells in freezing medium...
steps.instruction: {Optional} Resuspend cells in freezing medium to a concentration of 1x 10 7 cells and aliquot into cryogenic storage vials.
